items.name: Somtum
items.description: Shredded green papaya with cherry tomatoes, long beans, peanuts, and a fiery lime-fish-sauce dressing.

items.name: Larb Gai
items.description: Isan-style minced chicken with toasted rice powder, shallots, mint, and a sharp lime dressing.

items.name: Yum Woonsen
items.description: Springy glass noodles tossed with minced pork, shrimp, and a tangy chili-lime dressing.

items.name: Tom Yum Goong
items.description: The classic — lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime, bird's eye chili, and plump shrimp in a fragrant broth.

items.name: Tom Kha Gai
items.description: Creamy coconut milk broth with chicken, galangal, and lime leaves. Milder than tom yum, just as comforting.

items.name: Pad Kra Pao
items.description: Holy basil, chili, and garlic wok-fried with your choice of minced chicken or pork. Topped with a crispy fried egg.

items.name: Pad Phet
items.description: Red curry paste, long beans, and kaffir lime leaves stir-fried with pork or chicken.

items.name: Gaeng Keow Wan
items.description: Creamy green curry with chicken, Thai eggplant, bamboo shoots, and sweet basil.

items.name: Gaeng Massaman
items.description: Mild, nutty curry with potato, onion, and peanuts. A Thai-Malay fusion classic.

items.name: Gai Yang
items.description: Marinated chicken grilled over charcoal until the skin is crisp and the meat is juicy. Served with tamarind dipping sauce.

items.name: Moo Ping
items.description: Sweet-savory marinated pork skewers, grilled and caramelized. A street-food favorite.

items.name: Pad Thai
items.description: Rice noodles wok-tossed with egg, tofu, bean sprouts, and crushed peanuts in tamarind sauce.

items.name: Khao Pad
items.description: Jasmine rice fried with egg, garlic, and your choice of protein. Simple, aromatic, essential.

items.name: Khao Niao
items.description: Steamed glutinous rice — the perfect companion to larb, somtum, and grilled meats.

items.name: Cha Yen
items.description: Strong brewed black tea with condensed milk, poured over ice. Sweet, creamy, essential.

items.name: Cha Keow Yen
items.description: Jasmine green tea with milk and a hint of vanilla. Lighter than the classic.

items.name: Manao Soda
items.description: Fresh lime juice, soda water, and a touch of syrup. The ultimate palate refresher.

items.name: Khao Niao Mamuang
items.description: Sweet sticky rice with ripe mango and coconut cream. The perfect end to a spicy meal.
